title: Prudence
content:
Theme no poet gladly sung,
    Fair to old and foul to young;
    Scorn not thou the love of parts,
    And the articles of arts.
    Grandeur of the perfect sphere
    Thanks the atoms that cohere.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Prudence"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
